blogPosts.title: How to Structure a High-Converting Service Landing Page
blogPosts.excerpt: A practical structure for hero sections, proof blocks, and conversion paths that increase lead quality.
blogPosts.content:
# Why structure matters

High-converting pages are clear, specific, and fast.

## Recommended flow

1. Hero with clear value proposition
2. Social proof
3. Service detail with outcomes
4. CTA with low friction

Keep sections simple and measurable.

blogPosts.title: Editorial Workflow Checklist for Marketing Teams
blogPosts.excerpt: Set up a draft-to-publish workflow in your CMS so non-technical teams can ship content confidently.
blogPosts.content:
# Editorial workflow

Use statuses, approvals, and clear owners.

Draft quickly, review carefully, then publish with SEO checks.
